raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California has a severe affordable housing crisis that is impacting local communities.",
    "The pandemic has highlighted the importance of safe and sustainable housing.",
    "SB 791 aims to alleviate California's high housing burdens by promoting the production of affordable housing.",
    "SB 791 will expedite the construction of affordable housing on local government surplus land.",
    "The California Surplus Land Unit will provide consultative and technical assistance to local agencies to increase affordable housing production.",
    "The bill includes data collection components to help the Legislature better understand affordable housing production efforts."
  ]
}
```
